name: Cult of the Black Grail
special_rules: INFECTION MARKERS: Some weapons cause Infection Markers instead of Blood Markers.
Morale: Opponent adds -1 DICE to all Morale Checks (unless Court or Black Grail).
Leader: Must include at least 1 Lord of Tumours or 1 Plague Knight.
If Lord of Tumours taken: up to 2 Plague Knights. If no Lord of Tumours: 1-3 Plague Knights.

abilities: Beelzebub's Touch: Melee Attacks place Infection Markers instead of Blood Markers.
Crushing Blows: Can make Melee Attack without weapon with IGNORE ARMOUR.
Undead Fortitude: -1 INJURY DICE to Injury Rolls for this model.
Undead Fortitude: -1 INJURY DICE to Injury Rolls for this model.
Plague Knight Ranks: Can purchase one rank — Plague Almoner (10d), Knight Companion (5d, +1 DICE R or M), Knight of the Rotten Cross (5d, Limit: 1, buy 1 weapon from NA or HL armoury).
Bodyguard: Take hit for friendly BLACK GRAIL within 1" (not BLAST).
Undead Fortitude: -1 INJURY DICE to Injury Rolls for this model.
Fly Thrall variant: 6"/Flying instead of 5"/Infantry. Same cost.
Disease Carrier: Enemy activated within 1" gains Infection Marker.
Frightening Speed: +1 DICE to Risky for Dash.
Infected Proboscis: Melee Attack with +1 INJURY MODIFIER, CRITICAL. Places Infection Markers.
Flying: Measures movement through the air.
troops.battlekit_notes: Can only have Ranged Weapons and Compound Eyes Helmet. No other Battlekit.

abilities: Six-armed Monstrosity: Can take 1 Shoot and 1 Fight ACTION per activation with up to 3 weapons each.
Corpulent: -2 INJURY DICE for attacks with SHRAPNEL keyword.
Trample ACTION: Melee vs Downed with IGNORE ARMOUR.
Unstoppable: Enemies on 40mm or smaller cannot Block charge.
troops.battlekit_notes: Can carry up to 6 weapons. Cannot have same weapon more than twice. No Grenades. Can have Shield with Shield Combo. No other Battlekit.
